# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Prompt
- [ ] Template
- [ ] Demo feature pack
- [ ] Validation script
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Workflow / CI
- [ ] Repository hygiene
- [ ] Other

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No secrets are included.
- [ ] No production credentials are included.
- [ ] No real customer data is included.
- [ ] Generated vs executed language is safe.
- [ ] Human approval gates are preserved.
- [ ] External actions remain dry-run unless explicitly approved.
- [ ] Release readiness is not claimed without evidence.

## Validation

- [ ] `python 10-scripts/validation/check-agent-registry.py` passes.
- [ ] `python 10-scripts/validation/check-agent-prompt-coverage.py` passes.
- [ ] GitHub Actions is expected to pass.

## Documentation Updates

- [ ] README updated if needed.
- [ ] ROADMAP updated if needed.
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if needed.
- [ ] Validation coverage updated if required files were added.

## Notes

Add any reviewer notes here.
